ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trigger_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trigger line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the trigger line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trigger line */,
  "selection_criteria" TEXT /* Selection criteria used by the trigger line */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the trigger line */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trigger line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trigger line was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trigger line */,
  "l0_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of L0 events passing this line */,
  "hlt2_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of Hlt2 events passing this line */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Ratio of L0 to Hlt2 events */,
  "purity" REAL /* Purity of the events passing this line */,
  "uniqueness" REAL /* Uniqueness of the events passing this line */,
  "lines_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of events passing this line to all events */,
  "lines_1_ratio" REAL /* Additional metric related to events passing this line */,
  "spd_value" INTEGER /* SPD (a specific metric value) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_metrics_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES trigger_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event stream */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the event stream */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event stream */,
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detector that generated the event stream */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event stream was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_streams_detector_id FOREIGN KEY ("detector_id") REFERENCES detectors ("detector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detectors" (
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detector */,
  "detector_name" TEXT /* Name of the detector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the detector */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the detector in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processed_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processed event */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event stream this event belongs to */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trigger line that processed this event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was processed */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Data of the processed event */,
  "processing_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processed_events_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES event_streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processed_events_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES trigger_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, filter, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_monitoring" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric being monitored */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the monitoring data was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the monitored metric at this timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the system (e.g., OK, WARNING, CRITICAL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_monitoring_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES event_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trigger_line_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trigger line relation */,
  "line_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first trigger line in the relation */,
  "line_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second trigger line in the relation */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relation between the two trigger lines (e.g., OR, AND, XOR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trigger_line_relations_line_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("line_id_1") REFERENCES trigger_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trigger_line_relations_line_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("line_id_2") REFERENCES trigger_lines ("line_id")
)
